attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM )  /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */   AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT ,
 DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
 CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
 ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS SK_PH_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 DRVD.PD_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       ,
 DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIBUTION_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
 DRVD.CREATED_BY_INT                ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 DRVD.EXTRACT_TYPE_CODE             ,
 'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
 DRVD.GL_DATETIME            ,       
 DRVD.GL_DATE                 ,      
 DRVD.GL_POSTED_DATE           ,     
 'I' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE_CODE,
 DRVD.LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT           ,
 'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLAG,
 DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CODE     ,           
 WI.QUOTA_FLAG,  
 DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMOUNT   ,
 DRVD.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLAG       ,
 DRVD.RULE_START_DATETIME           ,
 WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_NUMBER                 ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE              ,
 DRVD.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE_TRX_AMT    ,
 DRVD.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE_TRX_AMT   ,
 /* rchettri: REBOK CHANGES : populate column from WI instead of EL for CG
 EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER   AS PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 */
 
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CG' THEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  ELSE EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
 END AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CG' THEN WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER   
  ELSE ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER
 END AS PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 */
 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER       ,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_CODE ,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJ_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,
 DRVD.PD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
 DRVD.PD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       ,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
 DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 /* CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DATE, */
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O'  THEN CAST(DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DATE AS DATE) ELSE CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) END AS DV_FISCAL_DATE ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG   ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG          ,
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
 CASE WHEN (WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT IS NULL OR WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = -999) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG,
 */
 CASE WHEN (WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  IS NULL  OR WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999)  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG,
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
 CASE WHEN WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT = -999 THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ,
 */
 CASE WHEN (WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER = '-999' OR WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER IS NULL OR WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER = 'UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_IC_REVENUE_FLAG       ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG          ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG             ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG          ,
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999
    THEN (
      CASE WHEN  ( NCA1.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
          OR NCA1.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE<>'I'
            )  
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG='Y' 
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG='N' 
          /* AND (CASE WHEN (WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT IS NULL OR WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = -999) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )='N' */
    AND DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG ='N'
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG='N' 
          AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG='N' 
          /* AND (CASE WHEN WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT = -999 THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END )='N' */
    AND DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ='N'
        THEN 'Y' 
       ELSE 'N' 
      END
     )
   ELSE 
   ( CASE WHEN  (NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
        OR NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE<>'I')
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG='Y' 
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG='N' 
        /* AND (CASE WHEN (WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT IS NULL OR WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = -999) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )='N' */
     AND DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG ='N'
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG='N' 
        AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG='N' 
        /*AND (CASE WHEN WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT = -999 THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END )='N' */
     AND DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ='N'
      THEN 'Y' 
     ELSE 'N' 
    END 
   ) 
 END DV_BKGS_CORP_BKG_FLAG,
 
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
  ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)/ COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100))    
 END  AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT,
 
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
  ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1) / COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100))    
 END AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT,
 
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN  DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
  ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1) / COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100))  
 END AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_EXTENDED_QUANTITY     ,
 /* rchettri: REBOK CHANGES : populate column from WI instead of EL for CG
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888) THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER  END AS BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888) THEN ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 */
 CASE  WHEN DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
   ELSE 
    /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
    CASE WHEN DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CG' THEN WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER  
      ELSE ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER
    END 
    */
    WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER
 END AS BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 CASE WHEN DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN 
     /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
     CASE WHEN DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CG' THEN WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
       ELSE ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER
     END 
     */
     WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER
   ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
 END AS BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)  AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE, /** AI Bkgs **/
 DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
 CAST(BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS DATE) AS PROCESS_DATE ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY    ,                
 DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY     ,              
 DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,             
 /* OA Q3FY14 */
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
 USER,
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 DRVD.CONVERSION_RT   ,              
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
 'N' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
 WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE,
 DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT, 
 DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT, 
 DRVD.DV_TRX_QTY,
 WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
 DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
 DRVD.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI CHANGES FY19*/,
 DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
 DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
 DRVD.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
 DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
 DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
 DRVD.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
 DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Flexi Invoice*/,
	 COALESCE(AI.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,CASE WHEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END, 'N') AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG, /*Added as part of AI Bkgs*/
     COALESCE(AI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,CASE WHEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES')
THEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END, 'UNKNOWN') AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
     COALESCE(AI.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
 
 /* rchettri : commented : transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table 
 INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT MAX(MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID) AS MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID FROM 
    (
         SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_BKG WI_DRVD
   union all 
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P   
    ) TMP
  ) SM_MAX
 ON 1=1
 */
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APPLD_SC_I WI
  ON  DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WI.BK_SS_CD
 /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES : LEFT JOIN ON EL INSTEAD OF INNER JOIN 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
 */
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
  ON (ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT 
  AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)*/
 /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES : LEFT JOIN ON EL INSTEAD OF INNER JOIN  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
 */
 /*LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
  ON(WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = EST.TERRITORY_ID
  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EST.GLOBAL_NAME) */
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_REP_NUMBER,EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SS_CD FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_TV GROUP BY 1,2,3) ELSALER
  ON (ELSALER.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT =  WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT 
  AND ELSALER.SS_CD =  WI.BK_SS_CD) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SS_CD FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_TV GROUP BY 1,2,3) EST
  ON(WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = EST.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
  AND WI.BK_SS_CD = EST.SS_CD)
 */ 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NARTRX
  ON (DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY = NARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL   
  ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NARTRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)  
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA1  
  ON (NCA1.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)  
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA 
  ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NARTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
 INNER JOIN (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ) BPDC 
  ON 1=1
  LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.AR_BKG_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_F AI /** AI Bkgs mvp4 **/
  ON DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = AI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON DRVD.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY

SELECT 
   BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , BK_SS_CD , DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
   OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
   SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,  SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, QUOTA_FLAG,
   SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM, BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,   
   EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT, EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT, EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT, SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   EVENT_TYPE
   /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: ADDED COLUMNS */
   , SALES_REP_NUMBER    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT         
 FROM
 (
  (
   SELECT DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
   DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
   WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
   WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM, WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,   
   WI.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT, WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.EVENT_TYPE  ,  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
   , WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER    ,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           
   /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
      INNER JOIN (
	  SELECT NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.SS_CODE as SS_CODE
	  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
	  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
      ON coalesce( NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
	 	ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_SCA_NRT_TV WI
    ON ( WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
      AND WI.EVENT_TYPE = 'INSERT'
	  /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
      AND WI.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AND WI.SS_CD = DNATIL.SS_CODE
     )
   WHERE DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <>'O' 
    AND (DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'FORWARD'  OR DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'F')
    /* AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DATE < WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM     */ 
    /* AND DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME <  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM   */
    AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLAG IN ('Y','R') 
    AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999	
  )
  UNION  
  (
   SELECT DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
   DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
   WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
   WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM, WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,   
   WI.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT, WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT, WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.EVENT_TYPE ,  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    , WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER    ,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  , WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY          
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE PNATL   
    ON NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = PNATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
    inner JOIN 
		  (Select NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY as AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  as PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT as SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, NATIL.SS_CODE as SS_CODE
	  from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
	  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
      ON coalesce (NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) NATIL_TOPSKU
	  on PNATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATIL_TOPSKU.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_SCA_NRT_TV WI
    ON ( WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
      AND WI.EVENT_TYPE = 'INSERT'
     /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
      AND WI.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NATIL_TOPSKU.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
	  AND WI.SS_CD = NATIL_TOPSKU.SS_CODE  
     )
   WHERE DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <>'O' 
    AND (DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'FORWARD'   OR DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'F')
    /* AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DATE < WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM   */
    /* AND DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME <  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  */
    AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLAG IN ('Y','R')
    AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999   	
  ) 
 )VW_AR_INSERT
 QUALIFY RANK () OVER ( PARTITION BY DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,  DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
 ORDER BY BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1

SELECT
ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS SK_PH_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
DRVD.PD_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       ,
DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
DRVD.GL_DISTRIBUTION_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
DRVD.CREATED_BY_INT                ,
DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
DRVD.EXTRACT_TYPE_CODE             ,
'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
DRVD.GL_DATETIME            ,       
DRVD.GL_DATE                 ,      
DRVD.GL_POSTED_DATE           ,     
'I' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE_CODE,
DRVD.LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT           ,
'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLAG,
DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CODE           ,     
DRVD.QUOTA_FLAG,
DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMOUNT   ,
DRVD.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLAG       ,
DRVD.RULE_START_DATETIME           ,
WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
DRVD.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
DRVD.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
DRVD.AR_TRX_NUMBER                 ,
DRVD.AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE              ,
DRVD.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE_TRX_AMT    ,
DRVD.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE_TRX_AMT   ,
DRVD.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        ,
DRVD.PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER           ,
DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER       ,
DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_CODE ,
DRVD.PD_AR_ADJ_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,
DRVD.PD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
DRVD.PD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
DRVD.DV_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       ,
WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
/* CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DATE, */ 
CASE WHEN DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O'  THEN CAST(DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DATE AS DATE) ELSE CAST(WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) END AS DV_FISCAL_DATE ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG   ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG          ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG          ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG         ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_IC_REVENUE_FLAG       ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG          ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG             ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG          ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_CORP_BKG_FLAG         ,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT   * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT   * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT      * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
DRVD.DV_BKGS_EXTENDED_QUANTITY     ,
DRVD.BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
DRVD.BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   * -1 AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
CAST(BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS DATE) AS PROCESS_DATE ,
DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY    ,                
DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY     ,              
DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,             
 /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
 DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
USER,
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
DRVD.CONVERSION_RT   ,              
DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                ,
DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE,
DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT, 
DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT, 
DRVD.DV_TRX_QTY,
DRVD.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
DRVD.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI CHANGES FY19*/,
DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM  ,
DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM    ,
DRVD.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION           ,
DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG              ,
DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT       ,
DRVD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT        ,
DRVD.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Flexi Invoice*/,
DRVD.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
DRVD.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD

/* rchettri : commented : transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table 
INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT MAX(MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID) AS MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID FROM 
   (
        SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_BKG WI_DRVD
  union all
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P    
  
   ) TMP
 ) SM_MAX
ON 1=1
*/

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APPLD_SC_I WI
 ON  DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
 AND DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WI.BK_SS_CD
 
INNER JOIN (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL) BPDC
 ON 1=1
 
WHERE WI.OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG = 'Y'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  , DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1
